name: add-field
description: Add a new field/column to an existing entity (DB schema + Backend DTO + optional Frontend form). Stack-agnostic skeleton.

files.hint: Schema/migration: add column to entity table (Drizzle pgTable / EF DbContext / Prisma schema / TypeORM entity / SQLAlchemy model — find by entity name)
Backend model/DTO: add property mirroring the schema column (with proper type + nullability)
Backend serializer/mapper: include new field in input/output mapping if applicable
Frontend (only if visible): TypeScript interface + form input + display

checklist: Define column type (string/varchar, int, bool, datetime, json, etc) + nullability + default
Generate or write migration if framework requires it
Add to backend model/entity class with same nullability
Update DTO/request/response shapes if exposed via API
If field is visible: update frontend interface, form control, validation, display
